seoTitle: Kalumburu vs Kambalda West — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Kalumburu and Kambalda West. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Kalumburu vs Kambalda West: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kalumburu and Kambalda West.
heading: Kalumburu vs Kambalda West — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kalumburu, Western Australia and Kambalda West, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kalumburu has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Kambalda West (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kalumburu or Kambalda West safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kalumburu has a flood risk score of 29/100, while Kambalda West scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kalumburu scores 19/100 for bushfire risk. Kambalda West scores 55/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kalumburu or Kambalda West?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kalumburu has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.37% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
